extraction.one_line_summary: PADUN Mark won Stage 8 from breakaway for second consecutive mountain stage victory, while PORT Richie defended yellow by 17 seconds despite mechanical.
tactical_patterns: PADUN targeted KOM jersey by entering 18-rider breakaway day after stage win, calculating points to overtake CRADDOCK despite energy expenditure.
INEOS controlled tempo but allowed 18-rider breakaway 5 minutes, banking on final climb selection rather than early suppression.
PORT survived mechanical mid-stage by having teammates ease tempo at front, revealing team coordination value beyond pure climbing support.
MOVISTAR took nature break with 30 miles remaining despite narrow GC gaps, suggesting underestimation of time trial losses.

rider_signals.PADUN Mark: positive: Won consecutive HC mountain stages at age 24 while simultaneously executing KOM jersey calculation strategy
rider_signals.PORT Richie: positive: Defended 17-second lead without pushing hard on final climb, showing tactical restraint versus past aggressive style
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: Failed to pressure PORT on final climb despite teammate MOSS working, insufficient response after time trial losses
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Crashed on Joux Plane descent but preserved podium spot, continuing Tour favorite status per commentary
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Struggling at tail end of peloton on multiple stages, admission he cannot win revealing lack of form
